name: W.L. FOODS
message: [AI generated] W.L. Foods is a prominent food manufacturing and distribution company in the Philippines. It was founded in 1986 and quickly gained fame for its production of high-quality food products, especially in the snack food category. They offer a range of products like biscuits, wafers, candies, chocolates, pretzels, and drinks. W.L. Foods also exports its products to several countries across North America, Europe, Middle East, and Asia.
